markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 10
#### Article 46. Unif. Vehicle Certificate of Title Act
##### § 2128 — Court review

An act or omission to act of the commissioner under this article shall be subject to review by the supreme court in the manner provided in article seventy-eight of the civil practice law and rules.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
